synopsis: Jedi Master Temesh, his Padawan Anula, Pol and the rest of the Pathfinders stand face-to-face with the rogue comms team at the heart of this galactic mystery! In his mutated madness, a frightening new villain threatens to bring silence to the galaxy at any cost. Can the Pathfinders stop him before he destroys their mission . . . and them? Witness the thrilling finale in this action-packed issue!
title: The High Republic Adventures: Pathfinders #6
